title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Queen, King as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...UUR GGGHH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Listen, you-gara... must keep moving forward!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You talk about averaging Pedro,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But did you really expect to get a free pass...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...After transpassing in our territory?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Giff

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't want to mourn any more of your friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KyaA AAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...hop back to the woods and chew on some grass!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're more suited to something like that... Perorn~)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now then,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm still against allying with the beast pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we must teach these upstairs what it means to be an emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Live Floor, Skill Dome

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: URGHHH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is hopeless.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: These blue flames help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: While we have stamina...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But we're at our limit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must endure it or you'll turn back into an ice demon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that happens, you won't be able to stop rampaging...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you'll definitely die of ex- Haustion this time!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Keep yourself together!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, Tanuki-San is working on a cure while preserving himself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Apoo-san, we can't keep this up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: not while they stand between us and the cure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huff... Huff....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're like a steel wall, we can't get through!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did Queen-Sama expose us to the virus anyway!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Save your whimpering, he won't be moved by it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why-DRAKE!? Would you switch a sides...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why would you switch sides...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: X-DRAKE!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's HYogoro the flower!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is Wang's legendary YAKUZA boss suddenly here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's too strong. We can't get anywhere near the tanuki!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's with that physique!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was a shriveled geezer just a second ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now he's as formidable as he was when Kaido was trying to recruit him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Are these shivers from excitement?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Boss!! are you okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Except anyone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... it may have gotten a little chilly, but I pride myself on my fortitude.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being exposed to the virus may have brought me to the brink of death,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it also seems to have drawn out my dormant strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Huff ... Huff ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In other words, I gained this power in exchange for my remaining life force.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll use it to cut down the enemy's main forces!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 49 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
